column1: # ESP32 Custom Partition Table for FP_Module
# The ESP32 has 4MB of internal flash memory. This file tells
# the ESP-IDF build system how to divide that flash among:
#   - littlefs: LittleFS filesystem for fingerprint image files

column2: use a larger flash chip (8MB or 16MB)

column1: # and adjust the littlefs partition size accordingly.
